description: Testing pagination visibility based on number of records

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of pagination when:
+ Has no record
+ Has 1 record only
+ Has N-1 records
+ Has N records

Check display of pagination when:
+ Has N records + 1
expected_result:
2. Pagination is displayed correctly with correct format:
+ Page button links 
+ Default page
+ Position: 
+ Aligned:

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of pagination when:
+ Has multi pages
expected_result:
+ Each page has only N records
+ Display pages correctly as designed

description: Testing navigation functionality of pagination controls

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation of Previous Link of pagination when:
+ Current Page = First Page
+ CurrentPage = Last Page
+ firstPage < currentPage < lastPage
expected_result:
+ Display pagination links correctly.
+ Go to the destination page successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and  operation of Next Link of pagination when:
+ Current Page = First Page
+ CurrentPage = Last Page
+ firstPage < currentPage < lastPage
expected_result:
+ Display pagination links correctly.
+ Go to the destination page successfully

description: Testing pagination behavior with page refresh and URL manipulation

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check pagination display when press [F5] of keyboard
expected_result: All the records of current page is display correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check pagination display when press [Enter] of keyboard while URL is selected
expected_result: All the records of current page is display correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check pagination display when edit URL to:
+ CurrentPage =0 on URL
expected_result: Display the first page of Error page (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check pagination display when edit URL to:
+ CurrentPage =1 on URL
expected_result:
+ URL is change to the first page
+ All the records of page 1 is displayed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check pagination display when edit URL to:
+ CurrentPage = last page on URL
expected_result:
+ URL is change to the last page 
+ All the records of the last page is displayed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check pagination display when edit URL to:
+ CurrentPage = any text on URL (Ex: "abc")
expected_result:
+ URL is change to the first page
+ All the records of current page is displayed

description: Testing pagination behavior when deleting records from different pages

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check pagination when:
+ Delete all items in the first pages
expected_result:
The data sort is kept the same
Perpage setting is kept the same
The data in each page displays correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check pagination when:
+ Delete all items in the middle pages
expected_result:
The data sort is kept the same
Perpage setting is kept the same
The data in each page displays correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check pagination when:
+ Delete all items in the last pages
expected_result:
The data sort is kept the same
Perpage setting is kept the same
The data in each page displays correctly
